_comment: Red-team host-effect audit profile (RED_TEAM_CONTAINER.md P3). Default ALLOW so the target runs normally, but SCMP_ACT_LOG the sensitive syscalls — process creation, ptrace, namespace/mount changes — so each fires a kernel audit SECCOMP record the host-side SeccompAuditMonitor reads into a {kind: 'subprocess'|...} host-effect. It OBSERVES (logs), it does not block; the verdict is rendered out of band.
